title: Mar Duun
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Mar_dunn_crv.jpg|thumb|right|250px|''Mar Dunn'' laying [[Mine Type A|mines]] around [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|Escort Carrier]] ''[[Hininbirg]]''.]]
The '''''Mar Duun''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] used by the Rebel alliance. The ''Mar Dunn'', along with the ''[[Vop Hui]]'', attempted to disrupt a meeting involving [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] prototypes being transferred to the [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|Escort Carrier]] ''[[Hininbirg]]'' by deploying mines around the transfer point. However, the ''Mar Duun'' and the ''Vop Hui'' were destroyed along with the minefield by Imperial Ace [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
